name: python3-urllib3
title: python3-urllib3
summary: HTTP library with thread-safe connection pooling for Python3
description:
HTTP library with thread-safe connection pooling for Python3
urllib3 supports features left out of urllib and urllib2 libraries.
.
- Re-use the same socket connection for multiple requests (HTTPConnectionPool
and HTTPSConnectionPool) (with optional client-side certificate
verification).
- File posting (encode_multipart_formdata).
- Built-in redirection and retries (optional).
- Supports gzip and deflate decoding.
- Thread-safe and sanity-safe.
- Small and easy to understand codebase perfect for extending and
building upon.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-urllib3 because HTTP library with thread-safe connection pooling for Python3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-urllib3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-urllib3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-urllib3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
